known_fixes.solution: cd /mnt/d/clawsjoy/bin && pm2 delete agent-api && pm2 start agent_api.py --interpreter python3 --name agent-api -- --port 18103 && pm2 save
known_fixes.diagnosis: 检查 agent_api.py 是否存在，确保端口 18103 未被占用

known_fixes.solution: sudo service docker start || sudo dockerd > /tmp/dockerd.log 2>&1 &
